releaseNotes: Fixes product edit dialogs closing when focusing or clicking text fields, number fields, date fields, selects, labels, or textareas inside the modal.
Adds a capture-phase modal form-field guard so backdrop/outside-click handlers cannot accidentally close a product edit window while the user is editing.
Keeps Orders > Supplier Reorder Plan out-of-stock reorder support from 10.5.0.
Keeps automatic release JSON generation with real installer size and SHA-256 after npm run installer:win.
Keeps GitHub Releases as the current update host and keeps the multi-host-ready updater shape for Cloudflare R2, Bunny, S3, or another CDN later.
Keeps U4 parallel byte-range downloader, streaming fallback, update cache, installer verification, and safe startup behavior.
Updates real package/builder metadata to 10.5.1 and preserves the future-safe installer pattern Inventra-Setup-${version}.${ext}.
No app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, users, Supabase data, backup data, updater branding, or icon assets are deleted.
